data.content: Implemented stale grooming outcome execution. Branch: worktree-foolery-af11-stale-grooming-2. Commit: 9d05db813c009ba8d61bc4c0afcbf2e0d993f65d. Summary: successful stale grooming jobs now append a stale-provenance handoff capsule through backend.update, still_do performs no other mutation, reshape applies suggested title/description/acceptance through backend.update, drop marks the beat abandoned through backend.markTerminal, and status/review observability is preserved. Verification: targeted stale grooming tests, lint, typecheck, full unit tests, and production build all passed.
